item.title: Delivery Surge: 225 Stocks Show Institutional Activity and Balanced Market Sentiment
item.description: This week, the Indian equity market exhibited a notable pattern of high delivery volumes and traded values across a broad range of stocks, signalling robust institutional participation. Despite the absence of extreme delivery percentage signals indicating exclusive buying or selling, the market maintained a balanced sentiment between accumulation and distribution, reflecting cautious yet active engagement by investors. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Breakout Alert: 370 Bullish Technical Signals Shape This Week’s Market
item.description: This week’s technical landscape was dominated by a strong bullish bias, with a significant majority of breakout signals pointing towards upward momentum across market caps and sectors. The prevalence of golden cross patterns and gap ups suggests a market environment favouring continuation of positive trends, while bearish signals remained limited and concentrated in select sectors. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Volume Explosion: 98 Stocks Lead Trading Frenzy With 501 Upper Circuit Hits
item.description: This week witnessed an extraordinary surge in trading activity, with a significant number of stocks registering exceptional volumes and circuit breaker events. The predominance of upper circuit hits signals strong bullish momentum across multiple sectors, particularly in private sector banking, oil, and automobiles. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Rating Revisions Surge: 442 Upgrades and 151 Downgrades Across Key Sectors This Week
item.description: This week witnessed a pronounced shift in stock evaluations, with a substantial number of score adjustments reflecting evolving market dynamics. The Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC), Garments & Apparels, and Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sectors emerged as focal points for these rating revisions, signalling changing investor perceptions and sector-specific developments. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: 52-Week High Alert: 83 Stocks Surge Led by NBFC and Auto Components
item.description: This weekly saw notable sector-level momentum with financial services and industrial components leading the charge in price strength, while apparel and technology sectors faced pressure. The market exhibited a clear bias towards large-cap stocks, reflecting selective buying interest amid mixed sector dynamics. Time: 5 minutes ago
